title: LotsMaybeNothing BETA
description: A texture pack that makes everything very simple.
body:
Welcome to **LotMaybeNothing**! This is a simplistic texture pack that makes everything very simple.

That's about it. Right now it's in beta so not everything is textured yet. Be sure to sick around to see it to completion!

There's now a Bedrock port of LMN go check it out! - [LotsMaybeNothing Bedrock Edition](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/lotsmaybenothing-bedrock-version/)

## LMN Roadmap

**_*Updates may release late if I can't finish them in time._**

**_*Texture goals, release dates, and release times can be changed at anytime, some of these goal are not fully considered yet._**

**If you want teasers for the next update be sure to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/ryQngRducf) or follow the [Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@redlessdev)**

<details>
<summary>BETA Update 3.3 Goal - Completed</summary>
 
**Releases: 06/20/2026 - 5:00PM (CST)**

**Update Type: Regular**

## Changes:
 - All Lapis stuff
 - All Hanging Signs
 - Minecart
 - Turtle
 - Chainmail Armor
 - And more!

</details>

<details>
<summary>BETA Update 3.4 Goal - Not Started</summary>

**Releases: ??/??/2026 - ??:??PM (CST)**

**Update Type: Regular**

## Changes:
 - All Beds
 - All Bundles
 - Flint and Steel
 - Both Campfires
 - Lava
 - Fire
 - And more!

</details>

Green = Released, Red = Delayed
